name: Rating
description: Star rating input with half-star support.

api.name: Rating
api.description: Star rating input with half-star support.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The current rating, from 0 up to Max. Two-way bindable via ValueChanged. Fractional .5 values are only meaningful when AllowHalf is set.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised whenever the rating changes, via click, drag, or arrow-key navigation.

parameters.name: AllowHalf
parameters.description: Allows selecting half-star values (clicking an already-selected star toggles it down by 0.5).

parameters.name: ReadOnly
parameters.description: Disables all interaction (click, drag, keyboard), rendering the stars as a static display.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label (outside a FormField). Purely visual — the widget does not enforce a non-zero selection.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive error text), independent of the ambient FormField's validation state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the stars (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText.

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the stars (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text rendered above the stars (outside a FormField, which supplies its own label).

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Field name for form-field integration. Not currently rendered onto the radiogroup markup.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the star row (the role="radiogroup" element).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the star row (the role="radiogroup" element).

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised whenever the rating changes, via click, drag, or arrow-key navigation.

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<Rating Value="3" ReadOnly="true" Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm" />
<Rating Value="3" ReadOnly="true" />
<Rating Value="3" ReadOnly="true" Size="Lumeo.Size.Lg" />

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

mdSummary:
# Rating

Star rating input with half-star support.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/rating

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Rating | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Rating | Value | `double` | `0` | The current rating, from 0 up to Max. Two-way bindable via ValueChanged. Fractional .5 values are only meaningful when AllowHalf is set. |
| Rating | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<double>` | `` | Raised whenever the rating changes, via click, drag, or arrow-key navigation. |
| Rating | Max | `int` | `5` | Number of stars rendered. Default 5. |
| Rating | AllowHalf | `bool` | `false` | Allows selecting half-star values (clicking an already-selected star toggles it down by 0.5). |
| Rating | ReadOnly | `bool` | `false` | Disables all interaction (click, drag, keyboard), rendering the stars as a static display. |
| Rating | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the \<Icon\> component. |
| Rating | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Star size. Default Md. |
| Rating | Required | `bool` | `false` | Marks the field as required, appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label (outside a FormField). Purely visual — the widget does not enforce a non-zero selection. |
| Rating | Invalid | `bool` | `false` | Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive error text), independent of the ambient FormField's validation state. |
| Rating | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the stars (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText. |
| Rating | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the stars (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display. |
| Rating | Label | `string?` | `` | Label text rendered above the stars (outside a FormField, which supplies its own label). |
| Rating | Name | `string?` | `` | Field name for form-field integration. Not currently rendered onto the radiogroup markup. |
| Rating | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the star row (the role="radiogroup" element). |
| Rating | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the star row (the role="radiogroup" element). |

## Slots
- `IconContent` (Rating) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the \<Icon\> component.

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<double>`) — Raised whenever the rating changes, via click, drag, or arrow-key navigation.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Rating />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Rating/Rating.razor`
